prompt: A polished anime-style illustration of Gilgamesh and Enkidu on a quiet park date, shown from the thighs up while walking side by side along a sunlit stone path beside a lake. The left character is a tall, slender young man with short straight golden blond hair, wearing a black open overshirt, a loose white V-neck T-shirt, and beige khaki pants with both hands in his pockets. The right character is a slim and ethereal young person with very long flowing soft green hair streaming to the right in the breeze, wearing an oversized white hoodie with black drawstrings and one hand gesturing naturally while walking. Their mood is gentle, intimate, and slightly romantic, like an ambiguous casual date. Place them centered in the foreground with the blond character on the left and the green-haired character on the right, both looking toward each other or slightly ahead. The background is a beautiful public park in bright late-morning or early-afternoon summer light: tall leafy trees arch overhead, creating dappled shadows on the path; a calm lake runs along the left side behind a black metal fence; a small arched bridge appears in the mid-distance; flowerbeds with white and purple blossoms line the walkway; 2 park benches are visible on the left side; 1 lamppost stands near the water; and 1 tiny distant pedestrian walks on the right side of the path. Use a vivid blue sky with small white clouds, lush greenery, high-detail foliage, soft cinematic sunlight, clean linework, and refined painterly shading. SFW, elegant, serene, visually rich anime key art, with a romantic slice-of-life atmosphere and a vertical composition.
